name: Holiday Stuffed Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: Boneless pork loin roast (3-1/2 lbs.), rolled & tied
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook almonds in butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat until brown.
2. Add onions and celery; cook until vegetables are tender crisp. Stir in rice, 1/2 cup orange juice, orange peel, 1 teaspoon ginger, and salt; set aside.
3. Untie the roast and spoon the rice mixture lengthwise between the loins. Retie the roast securely with string at 2- to 3-inch intervals.
4. Place the roast, fat side down, on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
5. Combine rosemary and pepper; sprinkle over the roast.
6. Insert a meat thermometer (ensure it does not touch stuffing or fat). Bake at 325°F for 1-1/2 hours.
7. In a small saucepan, combine cranberry sauce, remaining orange juice, remaining ginger, and orange. Simmer over medium heat for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Brush about 1/2 cup of the cranberry mixture over the pork.
9. Bake an additional 15 minutes or until the meat thermometer registers 170°F.
10. Let the roast stand for 10 minutes before slicing. Serve with remaining cranberry sauce.
11. Makes 6 to 8 servings
